rows.yaml:
collection: Default
playbooks:
  - name: Phishing Alert IP Reputation and Block
    description: For phishing alerts, check sender IPs against VirusTotal, prompt analyst to block high-risk IPs via FortiGate.
    is_active: true
    parameters: []
    steps:
      - type: start_on_create
        name: Phishing Alert Created
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          when:
            logic: AND
            filters:
              - field: tags
                op: like
                value: phishing

      - type: set_variable
        name: Initialize Collections
        vars:
          sender_ips: "{{ vars.input.records[0].sender_ips | default([]) }}"
          high_score_ips: []
          ip_scores: {}
        next: Check IPs Present

      - type: decision
        name: Check IPs Present
        conditions:
          - display: IPs Found
            when: "{{ vars.sender_ips | length > 0 }}"
            next: Query VirusTotal for Each IP
          - display: No IPs
            default: true
            next: Post Summary No IPs

      - type: connector
        name: Query VirusTotal for Each IP
        arguments:
          connector: virustotal
          operation: query_ip
          config: ''
          params:
            ip: "{{ item }}"
        for_each:
          item: "{{ vars.sender_ips }}"
        next: Process Reputation Results

      - type: code_snippet
        name: Process Reputation Results
        arguments:
          code: |
            high_score_ips = []
            ip_scores = {}
            # vars.steps.Query_VirusTotal_for_Each_IP is a list of results, one per iteration
            for i, ip in enumerate(vars['sender_ips']):
              result = vars['steps']['Query_VirusTotal_for_Each_IP'][i]
              score = result.get('reputation', 0)
              ip_scores[ip] = score
              if score > 50:
                high_score_ips.append(ip)
            # Store in workflow vars for downstream access
            vars['high_score_ips'] = high_score_ips
            vars['ip_scores'] = ip_scores
        next: Check High Scores

      - type: decision
        name: Check High Scores
        conditions:
          - display: High Risk IPs Found
            when: "{{ vars.high_score_ips | length > 0 }}"
            next: Ask Analyst to Block
          - display: All IPs Clean
            default: true
            next: Post Summary All Clean

      - type: manual_input
        name: Ask Analyst to Block
        arguments:
          title: High-Risk Sender IPs Detected
          description: "The following sender IPs have VirusTotal reputation scores > 50 and are flagged as potentially malicious: {{ vars.high_score_ips | join(', ') }}. Do you want to block them on FortiGate?"
        options:
          - display: Block
            primary: true
            next: Block IPs on FortiGate
          - display: Skip
            next: Post Summary Skipped

      - type: connector
        name: Block IPs on FortiGate
        arguments:
          connector: fortigate-firewall
          operation: create_address
          config: ''
          params:
            address_category: IPv4 Address
            name: "Phishing_Alert_{{ vars.input.records[0].id }}_{{ item | replace('.', '_') }}"
            type: Subnet
            subnet: "{{ item }}/32"
            comment: "Blocked phishing sender IP from alert {{ vars.input.records[0].name }}"
        for_each:
          item: "{{ vars.high_score_ips }}"
        next: Post Summary Blocked

      - type: set_variable
        name: Post Summary Blocked
        vars:
          summary: "Alert processed. High-risk IPs blocked on FortiGate: {{ vars.high_score_ips | join(', ') }}"
        message:
          content: "Phishing Alert Processed\n\n**Action Taken**: Blocked {{ vars.high_score_ips | length }} high-risk sender IP(s) on FortiGate.\n\n**IP Scores**:\n{% for ip, score in vars.ip_scores.items() %}\n- {{ ip }}: {{ score }}\n{% endfor %}"
          tags:
            - phishing_automated_block
        next: End

      - type: set_variable
        name: Post Summary Skipped
        vars:
          summary: "Alert processed. High-risk IPs identified but not blocked: {{ vars.high_score_ips | join(', ') }}"
        message:
          content: "Phishing Alert Processed\n\n**Action Taken**: Identified but skipped blocking {{ vars.high_score_ips | length }} high-risk sender IP(s).\n\n**IP Scores**:\n{% for ip, score in vars.ip_scores.items() %}\n- {{ ip }}: {{ score }}\n{% endfor %}"
          tags:
            - phishing_analyst_skip
        next: End

      - type: set_variable
        name: Post Summary All Clean
        vars:
          summary: "Alert processed. All sender IPs have safe reputation scores."
        message:
          content: "Phishing Alert Processed\n\n**Action Taken**: No high-risk sender IPs detected. All IPs have VirusTotal reputation scores ≤ 50.\n\n**IP Scores**:\n{% for ip, score in vars.ip_scores.items() %}\n- {{ ip }}: {{ score }}\n{% endfor %}"
          tags:
            - phishing_all_clean
        next: End

      - type: set_variable
        name: Post Summary No IPs
        vars:
          summary: "Alert processed. No sender IPs found in alert."
        message:
          content: "Phishing Alert Processed\n\nNo sender IPs found in alert to evaluate."
          tags:
            - phishing_no_ips
        next: End

      - type: end
        name: End
